name: Joint Interest Consideration Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to joint interests held with non-spouses where the survivor provided 'adequate and full consideration' for their share.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exclude the portion of a joint tenancy's value from the gross estate that can be proven to have originated from the surviving tenant's own funds rather than the decedent's.
